meaning: n.十亿分之一公尺,毫微米
examples: The laser shots created nanometer-sized particles in the air.
Today, a 45-nanometer Penryn chip from Intel holds 820 million transistors.
Intel could also give an update on its overall 'Penryn' [45-nanometer] line.
When it comes to the importance (or otherwise) of the nanometer, journalists often don't help.
However, elevated competition among manufacturers of 30-nanometer-class chips will lead to a price decline.
